notes: Reviewed all 53 events in order; 8 events were byte-identical duplicates of earlier events (admin/governance 8-Ks and bare Item 2.02 stubs with no press-release text).

Skipped as vague/banned (8): 'strategic initiatives' (vague), 'operational excellence' (vague), 'brand health metrics' bundle (vague), bare macro-uncertainty mentions (bare category), Texas floods / California wildfires (no causal claim on results), 'honeymoon period' for new units (metaphor), guest 'value scores' (too vague to name a causal variable), 'supply chain strategy' (vague strategy label; the concrete driver is bone_in_chicken_wing_cost).

Branded items renamed without company name: 'Wingstop Smart Kitchen' -> kitchen_operating_platform (source's own generic phrase); 'MyWingstop' platform folded into technology_capital_expenditures evidence.
No consensus data in sources, so no {metric}_surprise names were coined; guidance lines from press releases produced {metric}_guidance candidates.
fiscal.ai KPI labels rewritten to standard driver names; raw labels kept as evidence_quote with source_id fiscal_ai:WING:<metric>.
